query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a white top and dark pants rides a bright green bicycle along a path, with horizontal streaks of warm light in the background suggesting an urban evening setting with buildings and street lighting visible in the distance.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred, ghostly figure in a white top and dark pants rides a bright green bicycle, the entire scene streaked with horizontal light trails and double-exposure layering that smears the rider and wheels into translucent overlapping forms, while warm urban lights and indistinct buildings streak across the background in a casually framed, snapshot-style capture that feels spontaneous and optically unstable.
